titleStmt.title: SII 27.435: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 435. (A.R. No. 575 of 1929-30.) AMBALPĀḌI, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. 2) set up by the side of the verandah in the prākāra of the Janārdanaśvāmin temple.
This record is fragmentary as the beginning is completely effaced and the slab is built in. It refers to gifts of land.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . namastuṁga
completely effaced
tōṭa nage teṁka vobara gaddeli mu 2 daragadde mu 2 hā
paniṁda gala gaddemu 10 . ka pana meṭināya lagadde
ni Aṇṇamaḍiyiṁda . kāta gadeli mu 5 3 Aṁṇamapakarasa
ma cuṁcima keralāyaniṁda . gaṭṭigaddellimu Þ gaddeli mu 3 gaurigaddeli . mu 4
kesa keralāya biṭṭayiṁda yiśvaragaddeyiṁda mu 8 gōviṁda . kesa niṁma ṇi Aṁ
gaddeli mu 2 Aṁṇama keralāyaniṁda kiṁnniṁṇacana gaddemu 3 huṇiseṁba gadde mu 3
beḷakaṁbāgila mu 4 Aḍaketōṭadali mu 1 nāraṇakeralāyaniṁda . mane mu
bayala doḍḍagadde guḷigadde yi Eraḍu gadelli . mu 6� ṁmu 86 hā 25 ra viśa
paraharavageli 2 maddaḷe Eraḍake hā 2 hegāre Eraḍake hā 2 koṁbu 2 ke hā 2 tōṭa 1 ke
hā 2 gaṁṭe 1 ke hā 1 paṁja 1 ke hā . 1 bāvi 1 ke hā 1 . Aṁvāda . 12 kaliga 1 kke Akki
hā 12 lekadalu varuśa 1 ke muḍi 8 . hā 20 . śrībaliyapacegaṭṭaṇege biṭa taḷada viva
[ra .] mattaṁ ra salika gacege va tanna manemūḍabayyaladoḍḍa gaddeli mu 12 Akikujaneṇege
maṁdabe yirisuva Akitaḷada vivara kuṁjamakeralāyaniṁda baḍaga bāgilagade koṁme
Upādhyayana gadde yi Eraḍu gadeli mu 7 hā 10 ... pābunakara liṁga gaḍiṁdali A yi
kisuva Akki taḷada vivara 7 biḍiṁda teṁka haballi . muḷakaṇārapāḍili jarikaṇā
rasakara niṁda kaṭikāreṁba gaddeli . mu 2 kiṁ baṁganiṁda tōḍina sakarana kṛli
mu 1 biṭa lakṣmiyirisuva Amataḷada vivara . kaṁdikeli . nāvadakkaralli Aḷa Āḷa
tōḍili mu 7 Arkkuḷada beṭili bōrigaḷiṁda saraḷa Āṭigadde 5 mu 3 kaṇārapāḍi
li kere tūrāyana sarvvasvadali kaṭṭida ba(ṁ)ḍihaṇa 1 du� muḍamane galuri
yirisu Ama vivara . modaḷa śiva . geyiva . matadagaddeli . mu 10The rest of the record is built in.
Digital edition of SII 27.435 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
